2147                                        ic_truth.append(ref.detach().cpu())
2148
2149                                all_preds.append(torch.stack(ic_preds))
2150                                all_truth.append(torch.stack(ic_truth))
2151
2152                        # Stack: (nics, steps, C, H, W)
2153                        preds_np = torch.stack(all_preds).numpy()
2154                        truth_np = torch.stack(all_truth).numpy()
2155
2156                        log_dict = {}
2157
2158                        # Rollout snapshots for each channel
2159                        for ch in range(min(3, preds_np.shape[2])):
2160                            fig = plot_rollout_snapshots(
2161                                preds_np, truth_np, channel=ch,
2162                                n_snapshots=6,
2163                            )
2164                            log_dict[f"rollout_{['height','vorticity','divergence'][ch]}"] = wandb.Image(fig)
2165                            plt.close(fig)
2166
2167                        # RMSE vs lead time
2168                        fig = plot_rmse_vs_leadtime(
2169                            preds_np, truth_np,
2170                            channels=list(range(min(3, preds_np.shape[2]))),
2171                            dt_minutes=_dt_minutes
2172                        )
2173                        log_dict["rmse_vs_leadtime"] = wandb.Image(fig)
2174                        plt.close(fig)
2175
2176                        # Variance vs lead time
2177                        fig = plot_variance_vs_leadtime(
2178                            preds_np, truth_np,
2179                            channels=list(range(min(3, preds_np.shape[2]))),
2180                            dt_minutes=_dt_minutes
2181                        )
2182                        log_dict["variance_vs_leadtime"] = wandb.Image(fig)
2183                        plt.close(fig)
2184
2185                        if wandb.run is not None:
2186                            wandb.log(log_dict, commit=False)
2187
2188                        plot_time = time.time() - plot_start
2189                        print(f"  [plot_callback] Done in {plot_time:.1f}s")
2190
2191                    except Exception as e:
2192                        print(f"  [plot_callback] Error: {e}")
2193                    finally:
2194                        model.train()
2195                
2196                # Assign the function to the variable!
2197                plot_callback = generate_and_log_plots
2198
2199            train_model(
2200                model,
2201                dataloader,
2202                loss_fn,
2203                metrics_fns,
2204                optimizer,
2205                gscaler,
2206                scheduler,
2207                nepochs=pretrain_epochs,
2208                amp_mode=amp_mode,
2209                log_grads=log_grads,
2210                logging=logging,
2211                device=device,
2212                n_history=n_history,
2213                noise_injection_sigma=args.noise_injection_sigma,
2214                noise_injection_rate=args.noise_injection_rate,
2215                plot_callback=plot_callback,
2216                scratch_dir=model_scratch_dir,
2217                time_diff2_lambda=args.time_diff2_lambda,
2218            )
2219
2220            # Parse finetuning arguments into lists
2221            finetune_epochs_list = parse_list_arg(finetune_epochs, dtype=int)
2222            finetune_steps_list = parse_list_arg(finetune_steps, dtype=int)
2223            learning_rate_list = parse_list_arg(learning_rate, dtype=float)
2224            
2225            # Determine if we're doing multi-phase finetuning
2226            n_finetune_phases = max(len(finetune_epochs_list), len(finetune_steps_list))
2227            has_finetune = any(e > 0 for e in finetune_epochs_list) and n_finetune_phases > 0
2228            
2229            if has_finetune:
2230                # Broadcast single values to match number of phases
2231                if len(finetune_epochs_list) == 1 and n_finetune_phases > 1:
2232                    finetune_epochs_list = finetune_epochs_list * n_finetune_phases
2233                if len(finetune_steps_list) == 1 and n_finetune_phases > 1:
2234                    finetune_steps_list = finetune_steps_list * n_finetune_phases
2235                
2236                # Handle learning rate list:
2237                # - If single LR with pretrain > 0: use for pretrain, apply 0.1x for all finetune phases (backward compat)
2238                # - If single LR with pretrain == 0: apply 0.1x for all finetune phases (backward compat)
2239                # - If LR list length == n_finetune_phases: use directly for finetuning (no 0.1x)
2240                # - If LR list length == n_finetune_phases + 1 and pretrain > 0: first for pretrain, rest for finetuning
2241                if len(learning_rate_list) == 1:
2242                    # Backward compatibility: single LR, apply 0.1x factor for finetuning
2243                    finetune_lrs = [0.1 * learning_rate_list[0]] * n_finetune_phases
2244                elif len(learning_rate_list) == n_finetune_phases:
2245                    # Explicit LRs for finetuning phases only (no 0.1x)
2246                    finetune_lrs = learning_rate_list
2247                elif len(learning_rate_list) == n_finetune_phases + 1 and pretrain_epochs > 0:
2248                    # First LR for pretrain (already used above), rest for finetuning
2249                    finetune_lrs = learning_rate_list[1:]
2250                else:
2251                    raise ValueError(f"learning_rate list length ({len(learning_rate_list)}) must be 1, {n_finetune_phases}, or {n_finetune_phases + 1}")
2252                
2253                # Run each finetuning phase
2254                for phase_idx in range(n_finetune_phases):
2255                    phase_epochs = finetune_epochs_list[phase_idx]
2256                    phase_steps = finetune_steps_list[phase_idx]
2257                    phase_lr = finetune_lrs[phase_idx]
2258                    
2259                    if phase_epochs == 0:
2260                        continue
2261                    
2262                    nfuture = phase_steps - 1
2263
2264                    if logging:
2265                        print(f"Finetuning phase {phase_idx + 1}/{n_finetune_phases}: {phase_epochs} epochs, {phase_steps} steps, lr={phase_lr}")
2266
2267                    optimizer = torch.optim.Adam(model.parameters(), lr=phase_lr)
2268                    scheduler = torch.optim.lr_scheduler.ReduceLROnPlateau(optimizer, "min")
2269                    gscaler = torch.GradScaler(enabled=(amp_mode != "none"))
2270                    
2271                    # Rebuild DataLoader so finetuning workers see the new nfuture window.
2272                    # Mutating dataset.nfuture in place would leave persistent workers
2273                    # with a stale window size, causing them to silently return
2274                    # single-step targets instead of trajectories.
2275                    if precomputed_ds is not None:
2276                        dataloader = _make_precomputed_loader(nfuture_val=nfuture)
2277                    else:
2278                        dataloader.dataset.nfuture = nfuture
2279                    
2280
2281                    train_model(
2282                        model,
2283                        dataloader,
2284                        loss_fn,
2285                        metrics_fns,
2286                        optimizer,
2287                        gscaler,
2288                        scheduler,
2289                        nepochs=phase_epochs,
2290                        nfuture=nfuture,
2291                        amp_mode=amp_mode,
2292                        log_grads=log_grads, 
2293                        logging=logging,
2294                        device=device,
2295                        n_history=n_history,
2296                        noise_injection_sigma=args.noise_injection_sigma,
2297                        noise_injection_rate=args.noise_injection_rate,
2298                        plot_callback=plot_callback,
2299                        scratch_dir=model_scratch_dir,
2300                        time_diff2_lambda=args.time_diff2_lambda,
2301                    )
2302
2303                    
2304                    # Save checkpoint after each phase
2305                    phase_checkpoint = os.path.join(exp_dir, f"checkpoint_phase{phase_idx + 1}_AR{phase_steps}.pt")
2306                    torch.save(model.state_dict(), phase_checkpoint)
2307                    torch.save(model.state_dict(), os.path.join(exp_dir, "checkpoint.pt"))
2308                    if logging:
2309                        print(f"Saved phase checkpoint: {phase_checkpoint}")
2310                    
2311                    # Run validation rollout after each phase (if validate_steps > 0)
2312                    if validate_steps > 0 and nics > 0:
2313                        phase_tag = f"AR{phase_steps}"
2314                        if logging:
2315                            print(f"Running validation rollout for phase {phase_idx + 1} ({phase_tag})...")
2316                        with torch.inference_mode():
2317                            losses, _, _, _ = autoregressive_inference(
2318                                model, dataset, loss_fn, metrics_fns, 
2319                                os.path.join(exp_dir, "figures"), 
2320                                nsteps=nsteps, autoreg_steps=validate_steps, 
2321                                nics=nics, device=device, 
2322                                run_tag=phase_tag, n_history=n_history,
2323                                precomputed_dataset=precomputed_ds
2324                            )
2325                            # Stability check
2326                            is_stable = torch.isfinite(losses).all().item() and (losses.mean() < 1e6)
2327                            print(f"Phase {phase_idx + 1} ({phase_tag}) Stability Check ({validate_steps} steps): {'PASSED' if is_stable else 'FAILED'}")
2328                
2329                # Reset nfuture back to 0 — rebuild loader so workers are re-forked
2330                # with the correct single-step window for any subsequent pretraining.
2331                if precomputed_ds is not None:
2332                    dataloader = _make_precomputed_loader(nfuture_val=0)
2333                else:
2334                    dataloader.dataset.nfuture = 0
2335
2336            # Curriculum rollout training phase (optional)
2337            if curriculum_epochs > 0:
2338                if logging:
2339                    print(f"Curriculum rollout training {model_name}, {curriculum_epochs} epochs")
2340                
2341                # Parse curriculum schedule
2342                if curriculum_max_steps is not None:
2343                    max_steps_schedule = [int(x) for x in curriculum_max_steps.split(",")]
2344                else:
2345                    max_steps_schedule = None  # Use default linear ramp
2346                
2347                # Use 0.1x of base learning rate for curriculum (similar to old finetune behavior)
2348                curriculum_lr = 0.1 * parse_list_arg(learning_rate, dtype=float)[0]
2349                optimizer = torch.optim.Adam(model.parameters(), lr=curriculum_lr)
2350                scheduler = torch.optim.lr_scheduler.ReduceLROnPlateau(optimizer, "min")
2351                gscaler = torch.GradScaler("cuda", enabled=(amp_mode == "fp16"))
2352                
2353                train_curriculum_rollout(
2354                    model,
2355                    dataset,
2356                    loss_fn,
2357                    optimizer,
2358                    gscaler,
2359                    scheduler,
2360                    nepochs=curriculum_epochs,
2361                    num_examples=num_examples,
2362                    batch_size=batch_size,
2363                    amp_mode=amp_mode,
2364                    max_steps_schedule=max_steps_schedule,
2365                    logging=logging,
2366                    device=device,
2367                    n_history=n_history,
2368                    noise_injection_sigma=args.noise_injection_sigma,
2369                    noise_injection_rate=args.noise_injection_rate,
2370                    plot_callback=plot_callback,
2371                    scratch_dir=model_scratch_dir,
2372                )
2373
2374            training_time = time.time() - start_time
2375
2376            torch.save(model.state_dict(), os.path.join(exp_dir, "checkpoint.pt"))
2377            
2378            # Save a tagged checkpoint if run_tag is provided (preserves each stage)
2379            if run_tag:
2380                tagged_checkpoint = os.path.join(exp_dir, f"checkpoint_{run_tag}.pt")
2381                torch.save(model.state_dict(), tagged_checkpoint)
2382                print(f"Saved tagged checkpoint: {tagged_checkpoint}")
2383
2384        # set seed
2385        torch.manual_seed(333)
2386        torch.cuda.manual_seed(333)
2387
2388        # run validation
2389        print(f"Validating {model_name}")
2390        with torch.inference_mode():
2391            losses, metric_results, model_times, solver_times = autoregressive_inference(
2392                model, dataset, loss_fn, metrics_fns, os.path.join(exp_dir, "figures"), 
2393                nsteps=nsteps, autoreg_steps=validate_steps, nics=nics, device=device, 
2394                run_tag=run_tag, n_history=n_history,
2395                precomputed_dataset=precomputed_ds
2396            )
2397
2398            # Stability Check
2399            if nics > 0:
2400                is_stable = torch.isfinite(losses).all().item() and (losses.mean() < 1e6) 
2401                print(f"Stability Check ({validate_steps} steps): {'PASSED' if is_stable else 'FAILED'}")
2402                metrics[model_name]["stable"] = is_stable
2403
2404                # compute statistics
2405                metrics[model_name]["loss mean"] = torch.mean(losses).item()
2406                metrics[model_name]["loss std"] = torch.std(losses).item()
2407                if isinstance(model_times, list):
2408                     model_times = torch.tensor(model_times)
2409                if isinstance(solver_times, list):
2410                     solver_times = torch.tensor(solver_times)
2411                metrics[model_name]["model time mean"] = torch.mean(model_times).item()
2412                metrics[model_name]["model time std"] = torch.std(model_times).item()
2413                metrics[model_name]["solver time mean"] = torch.mean(solver_times).item()
2414                metrics[model_name]["solver time std"] = torch.std(solver_times).item()
2415                for metric in metric_results:
2416                    metrics[model_name][metric + " mean"] = torch.mean(metric_results[metric]).item()
2417                    metrics[model_name][metric + " std"] = torch.std(metric_results[metric]).item()
2418
2419            if train:
2420                metrics[model_name]["training_time"] = training_time
2421
2422        # Finish wandb run after validation completes to capture entire log
2423        if run is not None:
2424            run.finish()
2425
2426    # output metrics to data frame
2427    df = pd.DataFrame(metrics)
2428    if not os.path.isdir(os.path.join(root_path, "output_data")):
2429        os.makedirs(os.path.join(root_path, "output_data"), exist_ok=True)
2430    df.to_pickle(os.path.join(root_path, "output_data", "metrics.pkl"))
